programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham Society explore investment options to grow their savings. Meanwhile, Taarak is invited to join an exclusive investment group claiming to have experienced analysts.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak's interest is piqued when he sees well-known names in the promising investment group. But, he gets too excited by this and loses track of time, getting late for work.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak advises his boss to invest and personally invests as well. Subsequently, Jethalal seeks Taarak's advice regarding the same investment opportunity.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After hearing Taarak, everyone in Gokuldham Colony invests in the app. But will this investment bring them gains or is it all just a scam?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members are thrilled about their new investments. However, Bapuji cautions Jethalal not to celebrate until the profits are actually deposited in his account.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Excited by the potential for high returns, the colony members get ready for a key investment meeting. So, they are optimistic they can make a good profit.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Excitement runs high in the colony as everyone invests heavily after a successful meeting, dreaming of massive returns within a year. But is this golden opportunity too good to be true?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony awaits the return on their investment, hoping it meets their expectations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Panic engulfs the society members, including Taarak's boss, after errors are discovered on the website and the group. So, left with no alternatives, they seek assistance from Inspector Pandey.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Residents of the colony panic when they realise they are victims of a large fraud. So, they are devastated to learn that they have lost all their investments.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony is gripped with panic after discovering their entire investment has vanished. With the cyber crime unit offering no certainty of justice, can they find a way to recover their lost money?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While the residents are gripped by stress over the issue, the police arrive at Gokuldham society with surprising news.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham members are astonished as Popatlal discloses how he solved the cyber fraud case through his keen intellect and bravery.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal disguises himself as a snake charmer and begins his investigation. However, he finds himself in a fix when he is about to get exposed.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After exposing the scammers and promising those affected that their money would be reimbursed, Popatlal is lauded for his heroic actions. Later, the members of the society apologise to Taarak.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Magician AK begins his act by appearing in three different places at the same time. The CID team is baffled when his body is found at the third location and he is also seen at other places.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Abhijit goes undercover as a theatre artist for a play that is under threat. However, a murder takes place on stage in front of everyone and the killer manages to escape.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Sonu discover their parents' plans for their arranged marriages to other people. But, both of them refuse the marriage proposals, causing their parents to become concerned.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Champaklal attempt to persuade Tappu to consider marriage, but he firmly refuses. Meanwhile, Sonu faces similar pressure from her parents.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Sonu lament parental pressure for arranged marriage. Subsequently, Sonu's defiant words jolt Bhide awake from his slumber.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu frets as marriage pressure mounts, his usual tricks exhausted. Later, he scrambles for a cunning plan to evade the looming nuptial expectations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Sonu come up with a plan to hire an actor to help them avoid getting married. But will their plan work?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Sonu convince the actor to help them in this situation. Will their plan work out?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Chotelal, disguised as an astrologer, advises Bhide to stop worrying about Sonu's marriage now, in an attempt to help Sonu escape the situation. Will Bhide be convinced?

programme.desc: Jethalal asks about the performance of the shop during his absence. Abdul attempts to sell his merchandise as quickly as possible.

programme.desc: Tapu and his friends find Abdul's behaviour unusual and decide to investigate the mystery behind his recent actions.

programme.desc: Upon seeing his boss, Taarak hides under the table. However, the foreign clients at Jethalal's shop think it is yoga and start copying him.

programme.desc: Taarak tries to reach home before his boss does. Jethalal asks Abdul to help Taarak, but Abdul does not know what Taarak's boss looks like.

programme.desc: Bhide and Abdul try to occupy and keep Taarak's boss away from Gokuldham, but they fail. Jethalal and Taarak rush to his house.

programme.desc: Hathi and his wife insist that Taarak's boss needs to take a blood test when he tries to head to Taarak's house.

programme.desc: In a bid to buy enough time for Taarak to return home, Tapu and his friends request Taarak's boss to join them for a game of cricket.

programme.desc: Everyone in Gokuldham tries to prevent Taarak's boss from meeting him. However, he eventually manages to make his way to Taarak's home.

programme.desc: Champaklal prepares a present to surprise Tapu. Bhide grows irritated due to Tapu and his friends playing cricket late at night.

programme.desc: Tapu gets on Bhide's nerves when he calls Sonu inappropriately. Bhide is shocked when he catches Tapu's messages on Sonu's phone.

programme.desc: Bhide decides to keep a careful eye on all of Sonu's activities. He eventually finds Sonu hanging out with Tapu around town.

programme.desc: Bhide hears about his friend's daughter running away with her boyfriend and starts fearing the worst for Sonu.

programme.desc: Bhide tells Madhavi about Tapu and Sonu's relationship, but Madhavi does not believe him. Bhide decides to call Jethalal.

programme.desc: Everyone is curious about what went down between Jethalal and Bhide. They wait for Bhide at Jethalal's house.
